claims.evidence_text: The soil of the experimental plot was sandy loam in texture, nearly neutral in soil reaction (pH 8.0), organic carbon (0.62%), available N (225 kg/ha), available P (38.2 kg/ha), and available K (240.7 kg/ha).
claims.claim_summary: Experimental wheat field soil pH was 8.0 (moderately alkaline sandy loam).

claims.evidence_text: The experimental soil was sandy loam, moderately alkaline (pH 8.0), containing 0.62% organic carbon, with available 225 kg N, 38.2 kg P, and 240.7 kg K per hectare.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat was grown successfully on a sandy loam textured soil.

claims.evidence_text: the recommended fertilizer doses of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium (120:80:60 N:P:K kg/ha) were uniformly applied across all plots.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended nitrogen rate for wheat was 120 kg N/ha (NPK 120:80:60).

claims.evidence_text: the recommended fertilizer doses of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium (120:80:60 N:P:K kg/ha) were uniformly applied across all plots.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended phosphorus rate for wheat was 80 kg/ha (as P in NPK 120:80:60).

claims.evidence_text: the recommended fertilizer doses of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium (120:80:60 N:P:K kg/ha) were uniformly applied across all plots.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended potassium rate for wheat was 60 kg/ha (as K in NPK 120:80:60).

claims.evidence_text: closer spacing of 20 x 10 cm with variety HD-2967 (T1) performed superiorly over other treatments... it may be concluded that the 20 x 10 cm spacing with variety HD-2967 proved most effective for achieving higher yield and economic returns
claims.claim_summary: 20 cm row spacing (20x10 cm) gave the best wheat growth and yield.

claims.evidence_text: the combination of 20 cm x 10 cm spacing with variety HD-2967 (T1) resulted in the greatest plant height, reaching 104.37 cm.
claims.claim_summary: Maximum wheat plant height observed was 104.37 cm (HD-2967, 20x10 cm).

claims.evidence_text: The maximum number of tillers per square meter (101.93) was recorded under the treatment combining 20 cm x 10 cm spacing with variety HD-2967 (T1), which was significantly higher than all other treatments.
claims.claim_summary: Maximum wheat tiller density observed was 101.93 tillers/m2.

claims.evidence_text: At harvest, the highest number of spikes per square meter (84.94) was observed under the treatment comprising 20 cm x 10 cm spacing with variety HD-2967 (T1), which was significantly superior to all other treatments.
claims.claim_summary: Maximum wheat spike density observed was 84.94 spikes/m2.

claims.evidence_text: At harvest, the highest test weight (41.23 g) was recorded under the treatment comprising 20 cm x 10 cm spacing with variety HD-2967 (T1), which was significantly superior to all other treatments.
claims.claim_summary: Highest 1000-grain (test) weight observed was 41.23 g (HD-2967, 20x10 cm).

claims.evidence_text: the highest harvest index (38.97%) was recorded under the 20 cm x 10 cm spacing in combination with the HD-2967 variety (T1).
claims.claim_summary: Highest wheat harvest index observed was 38.97%.
